'''Ruris Plin''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] playwright.

==Biography==
Plin collaborated with fellow Rodian playwright [[Hishinu Booj]] and Rodian [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Onaconda Farr/Legends|Onaconda Farr]] to produce "[[The Trickery of Vosdia Nooma]]" just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The play was directed by Booj and premiered at the [[Equator City First Stage]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|life/13418_2.html|Rodian Campaigning Mixes Drama & Politics}} {{1st}}
